title: Blue's Myth
summary: After a 5000-year war, a half-elf, half-dwarf boy born to a royal magic knight and a dwarven hero blacksmith grows up in a dangerous demi-human village. Saved by a crystal fairy, he forges his path as a blacksmith-adventurer, aiming to rescue his mother, face demons, reach the Tree of Life, and eventually fight monsters beyond the planet's crystal shell.
